# Differential Evolution Algorithm

**Summary**: A stochastic optimization algorithm used for finding global optima in complex, non-linear problems.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-rammay|RAMMAY, 2015]] used differential evolution algorithm to optimize fracture and well parameters across three cases.

## Key Results and Findings

- Case 3 (including more variables) showed the highest profit increase of 199.5% compared to Case 2 (159%) and Case 1 (67.5%). ([[2015-rammay|RAMMAY, 2015, p. 95]])
